targets.query:
from(bucket: "gateway")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.label == "tank_pressure")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pressure_pa")

from(bucket: "gateway")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.label == "ambient_temp")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temp_c")

from(bucket: "gateway")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.label == "flow_meter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "flow_m3h")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "gateway")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.label == "flow_meter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "totalizer_m3")
  |> last()
